scripts.acceptance: pnpm run check && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:browser && pnpm run check:build && pnpm run test:p10-perf && pnpm run test:conformance && pnpm run check:fw
scripts.check: pnpm run check:inline-loader && vp check && vp run typecheck-examples
scripts.check:build: pnpm run check:inline-loader && vp run build
scripts.docs:serve: pnpm run check:build && pnpm --filter @jiso/site run build && HOST=0.0.0.0 node site/scripts/serve.mjs
